description_long: A cluster of three bananas rests on a white, round plate. The bananas have a yellow peel with numerous brown spots and patches, indicating advanced ripening. Their surfaces show some bruising and blemishes, with the peels appearing slightly wrinkled and soft. The bananas are gently curved, with their stems and tips overlapping and touching each other. The plate beneath them is smooth and unadorned, providing a clean contrast to the mottled texture of the fruit. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on any of the bananas.
description: Three spotted, yellow bananas with brown blemishes rest together on a plain white plate, showing signs of advanced ripening and surface bruising.
description_view_0: Three bananas with brown spots are seen from the side, clearly showing their overlapping arrangement on a white plate.
description_view_1: The bananas are viewed from a slight angle, highlighting the curvature and the way their stems converge at the back.
description_view_2: A rear view of the bananas, emphasizing the tips and the underside of the fruit as they rest on the plate.
description_view_3: The bananas are seen from the opposite end, with the stems pointing toward the viewer and the plate mostly visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are visibly blemished with brown spots and patches, and show some wrinkling and bruising. There are no major tears or splits, but the surface appears soft and slightly worn.
